reviews.review_description:
I am a drummer who's gone without a drum kit for 6 years due to moving, getting married, and living in small apartments. I did the kickstarter for the Aerodrums 2 hoping it could give me a comparable drumming experience in my  living room with my Quest 3 headset. OH MY WORD. IT FREAKING WORKS!!! The Aerodrums device works really, really well without any screen, but MAN! Having the visual que of the drum set right in front of you is just beautiful! Not only that, but now I have access to all sorts of drum kits that I would have to spend over $10,000 and more to have access to--and even then not in my LIVING ROOM. Aerodrums team--you've outdone yourselves.

*If you are reading this and do not have the Aerodrums 2 device--you really, really have not had the full experience of this app. This app is built for the Aerodrums 2 device, and it will change your life as a drummer, learning or experienced.

Great app, works great on Quest 2/3 with the "Aerodrums 2" system of course, it's just great what you can do with VR, the concept of the creators of this system have really thought of everything, I absolutely recommend it to all drummers, it's a real instrument. Now I can find myself behind great kits at 3am without disturbing my neighbors, what a joy!!! Deserves much more than 5 stars and thanks again for this little masterpiece :D
